source: Reviewed public video/ad creative links for Nevada campaign, PAC, and super PAC communications. Records intentionally store source-backed summaries and short claim notes, not full copyrighted ad transcripts.

records.title: Never Have
records.description: Jacky Rosen campaign ad presenting Rosen as willing to break with party leadership on policing, border security, and veterans issues.
records.authorizationText: Public YouTube creative from the Jacky Rosen campaign channel; exact disclaimer should be confirmed against the video frame before formal publication.
records.mediaText: Source-backed creative summary: the ad emphasizes Rosen's bipartisan identity and highlights policing, border security, and veterans benefits as examples. Full transcript is not copied into the repository.
records.issueLabel: Bipartisanship, public safety, border security, and veterans

claims.claimText: The ad presents Rosen as willing to break with her party on selected policy votes.
claims.explanation: The ad creative and Nevada Independent reporting describe the bipartisan framing; individual votes should be checked against congressional records before rating.

records.title: Sam Brown For Senate: Nevada's Back
records.description: AFP Action ad supporting Sam Brown with an economic message about taxes, spending, and energy policy.
records.authorizationText: Public YouTube creative from AFP Action; independent-expenditure disclaimer should be confirmed against the video frame before formal publication.
records.mediaText: Source-backed creative summary: the ad supports Sam Brown and frames his campaign around lower taxes, lower spending, and energy development. Full transcript is not copied into the repository.

claims.claimText: The ad says Brown has a plan to lower taxes, cut spending, and expand Nevada energy production.
claims.explanation: The claim is sourced from the public video description and should be evaluated against Brown's campaign materials and policy record before a truth rating is assigned.

records.title: Sam Brown For Senate: Nevada's Back, 15-second cut
records.description: Shorter AFP Action cut of the Sam Brown economic ad, emphasizing taxes, spending, and energy.
records.authorizationText: Public YouTube creative from AFP Action; independent-expenditure disclaimer should be confirmed against the video frame before formal publication.
records.mediaText: Source-backed creative summary: a 15-second version of AFP Action's pro-Brown economic message. Full transcript is not copied into the repository.

claims.claimText: The short ad repeats the taxes, spending, and energy message used in AFP Action's longer pro-Brown creative.
claims.explanation: The source is a public AFP Action video; the ad's policy claims still require independent issue-level review.

records.title: The Most
records.description: Susie Lee campaign ad highlighting a bipartisan record and work on costs for prescription drugs and housing in Nevada's 3rd Congressional District.
records.authorizationText: Public YouTube creative from the Susie Lee for Congress channel; exact disclaimer should be confirmed against the video frame before formal publication.
records.sourceTitle: The Most | Susie Lee for Congress
records.mediaText: Source-backed creative summary: the ad introduces Lee's 2024 TV message around bipartisanship and lower costs for prescription drugs and housing. Full transcript is not copied into the repository.

claims.claimText: The ad says Lee worked across party lines and focused on lowering prescription drug and housing costs.
claims.explanation: The claim is drawn from the public video description and needs follow-up against bill records, votes, and independent reporting.

records.title: Stark Choice
records.description: Susie Lee campaign ad framed around the contrast in the 2022 Nevada Congressional District 3 race.
records.authorizationText: Public YouTube creative from the Susie Lee for Congress channel; exact disclaimer should be confirmed against the video frame before formal publication.
records.sourceTitle: Stark Choice | Susie Lee for Congress
records.mediaText: Source-backed creative summary: the ad frames the congressional race as a contrast between competing policy directions. Full transcript is not copied into the repository.

claims.claimText: The ad positions the election as a policy contrast for voters in Nevada's 3rd Congressional District.
claims.explanation: The source verifies the creative exists; specific contrast claims need separate claim-level evidence before rating.

records.title: Rosen/Brown abortion ad fact-check context
records.description: News 4 Reno segment preserving context for Nevada Senate abortion-related campaign ads by Jacky Rosen and Sam Brown.
records.sponsorName: Multiple Nevada Senate campaigns and outside groups
records.paidForBy: Multiple sponsors; see underlying ads discussed by News 4 Reno
records.authorizationText: This is a source-backed context record, not a replacement for the original campaign creative. It should remain labeled as fact-check context until the original ads are attached.
records.sourceTitle: Fact-checking Nevada Senate candidates Sam Brown, Jacky Rosen's campaign ads on abortion
records.mediaText: Source-backed context summary: News 4 Reno reviewed abortion-related claims from Nevada Senate campaign ads. This record helps the ad tracker surface the issue and points reviewers back to the original creatives.

claims.claimText: The fact-check segment indicates abortion-related campaign ads in the Nevada Senate race required voter context.
claims.explanation: This is a context record; individual original ad claims need to be attached and rated separately.

records.title: Nevada Senate housing and COVID-relief ad fact-check context
records.description: News 4 Reno segment preserving context for Nevada Senate campaign commercials about housing and COVID-relief checks.
records.sponsorName: Multiple Nevada Senate campaigns and outside groups
records.paidForBy: Multiple sponsors; see underlying ads discussed by News 4 Reno
records.authorizationText: This is a source-backed context record, not a replacement for the original campaign creative. It should remain labeled as fact-check context until the original ads are attached.
records.sourceTitle: Fact-checking Nevada Senate campaign commercials on housing, COVID relief checks
records.mediaText: Source-backed context summary: News 4 Reno reviewed campaign-commercial claims about housing and COVID-relief checks in the Nevada Senate race. Original ad creative still needs attachment for final claim rating.

claims.claimText: The fact-check segment indicates housing and COVID-relief claims appeared in Nevada Senate campaign commercials.
claims.explanation: This is a context record; original ad scripts and official records should be attached before final ratings.
